haiku45.summary_excerpt: CRITICAL: New-EnvironmentMatrix.Tests.ps1 is missing but referenced in workflow (line 11 of .yml), guaranteeing failure. actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA (violates requirements). Hard-coded 'Tests Passed: 14' assertion (run-tests.ps1:75) but no test file to verify. JSON parsing in New-EnvironmentMatrix.ps1 lines 18-33 is convoluted, multiple PSCustomObject branches. Test harness (run-tests.ps1) has repetitive if-match patterns for assertions that should be refactored into a helper. M

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent GHA matrix generator. The test harness (run-tests.ps1) is exceptionally robust, validating workflow structure, actionlint, and exact act outputs. New-EnvironmentMatrix.ps1 handles limits and includes/excludes correctly. Manual JSON parsing (lines 21-41) is slightly redundant in pwsh.
